inputs.label: Volume in Milliliters
inputs.businessContext: The volume of liquid to convert, in milliliters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The volume of liquid to convert, in milliliters.

inputs.label: Cup Size
inputs.businessContext: Standard cup size in milliliters. Defaults to US customary cup.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard cup size in milliliters. Defaults to US customary cup.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mililitre cinsinden standart bardak boyutu. Varsayılan ABD geleneksel bardağıdır.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the output. Must be an integer between 0 and 10.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the output. Must be an integer between 0 and 10.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı için ondalık basamak sayısı. 0 ile 10 arasında bir tam sayı olmalıdır.

inputs.label: Number of Items
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical volumes to convert (e.g., bottles, batches).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical volumes to convert (e.g., bottles, batches).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüştürülecek özdeş hacim sayısı (örn. şişe, parti).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
